full_text:
Zhao Qu и¶ҷиЎў
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Qu (и¶ҷиЎў)was born in Hanyang. Shut Ma Chao out of Hanyang and murdered his family, became a general. Zhao Qu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
